data.title: Cardiac surgeons at Allegheny General Hospital are first in the region to perform a successful transcatheter tricuspid valve replacement.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 20, 2026, specialists in cardiology at Allegheny General Hospital, part of Allegheny Health Network (AHN), revealed their achievement of being the inaugural in the area and among the pioneering in the state to effectively execute a transcatheter procedure on the tricuspid valve.

data.title: Mars & AMERICAN HERITAGE® Chocolate award $52,800 in Chocolate History Grants at annual meeting.
data.description: Washington, D.C. - Mars and AMERICAN HERITAGE® Chocolate recently marked two decades of backing American history establishments at the Heritage Chocolate Society Gala Dinner. During the event, they granted a total of $52,800 to aid research efforts, with six organizations benefiting from this support.

data.title: Oil States International Q4 earnings beat estimates by 30%, reporting EPS of $0.13. Revenue increased by $13.87 million.
data.description: Oil States International (NYSE: OIS) disclosed its Q4 earnings on Friday, February 20, 2026 at 07:00 AM. The company exceeded expected earnings by 30.0%, with an EPS of $0.13 compared to the estimated $0.1. Revenue saw a $13.87 million increase from the previous year. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
Balchem Corp announces Q4 and full year 2025 financial results.

data.title: BHP and Faraday Copper sign LOI for Faraday to acquire BHP's San Manuel property and BHP to receive 30% equity interest and up to $20 million in equity raise participation.
data.description: In Washington, D.C. on February 20, 2026, it was reported that a subsidiary of BHP Group Limited and Faraday Copper Corp. have entered a non-binding letter of intent. This agreement entails the potential acquisition of BHP's San Manuel property in Arizona, USA by Faraday, resulting in Faraday owning 100% of the property. In return, BHP would receive a 30% stake in Faraday's equity, along with corresponding shareholder and marketing privileges. Notably, BHP has committed to participating in Faraday's equity fundraising activities over two years, with a maximum total subscription of US$20 million.

data.title: Palladyne AI (NASDAQ: PDYN) to discuss Q4 & full-year 2025 results in conference call on March 5, 2026 at 8:00am ET.
data.description: Palladyne AI Corp., a U.S.-based defense and industrial technology company listed on NASDAQ under PDYN and PDYNW, will hold a conference call on March 5, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter. Palladyne AI specializes in embodied AI-powered collaborative autonomy solutions, advanced avionics, precision-manufactured components, UAVs, and advanced aerospace engineering services.

data.title: Cogent Comms Hldgs (CCOI) beat earnings estimates by 40.74% in Q4, reporting EPS of $-0.64. Revenue down $11.77 million from last year.
data.description: Cogent Communications Holdings (NASDAQ: CCOI) released its Q4 earnings report on February 20, 2026. The report, issued at 07:00 AM, revealed that the company exceeded expected earnings by 40.74%, posting an EPS of $-0.64 compared to the estimated $-1.08. However, revenue saw a decline of $11.77 million year-over-year. For further details on the earnings results and a comprehensive analysis, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Transocean stock down on mixed Q4 results: Adjusted EPS of 2 cents (missing consensus of 8 cents), revenue $1.043B. Added 10 new fixtures w/ backlog of $610M. Operating expense $605M.
data.description: Shares of Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) are down in premarket trading following the announcement of their fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results. The company reported adjusted earnings of two cents per share, falling short of the expected eight cents per share. However, quarterly revenue exceeded expectations at $1.043 billion compared to the estimated $1.033 billion. Contract drilling revenues saw a 1.5% increase from the previous quarter, supported by higher rig utilization. Since October 2025, Transocean secured 10 new fixtures with a total incremental backlog of approximately $610 million and a weighted average day rate of $417,000. Operating and maintenance expenses totaled $605 million, up from $584 million in the prior quarter due to the addition of four rigs.

data.title: SECURE reports Full-Year 2025 Adjusted EBITDA of $501M, $373M returned to shareholders, 5% dividend increase, & $372M in Q4 revenue.
data.description: SECURE Waste Infrastructure Corp. reported full-year 2025 Adjusted EBITDA of $501 million and returned $373 million to shareholders through dividends and repurchasing 8% of outstanding shares. They provided 2026 Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $520–$550 million and approved a 5% increase in the quarterly dividend rate to $0.105 per share. The fourth quarter results included $372 million revenue, $53 million net income, and $135 million Adjusted EBITDA. The company repurchased 932,200 common shares and ended the year with a Total Debt to Adjusted EBITDA covenant ratio of 2.1x. They also closed an offering of $300 million senior unsecured notes. Company's net income for the year was $123 million, with full-year Adjusted EBITDA of $501 million and funds flow from operations of $378 million. Customer demand accelerated leading to a growth in capital spending. The Company also initiated a 5% voluntary dividend rate increase, and litigation with Canadian Energy Services is ongoing. The year 2026 outlook includes $520–$550 million Adjusted EBITDA, with growth driven by contracted water infrastructure projects and expansions in metals recycling business. They plan to continue a disciplined capital allocation strategy and focus on high-return projects and acquisitions. Maintaining a strong balance sheet, the Company aims for sustainable growth and resilient shareholder returns through 2026 and beyond.

data.title: Mitel and L-SPARK show success with Cohort in Unified Communications Accelerator at Showcase.
data.description: In Ottawa, Ontario, Mitel, a renowned company in business communications, partnered with L-SPARK, Canada's top software accelerator. They revealed the impressive results of the first Mitel Unified Communications Accelerator cohort, showcasing rapid progress and market-ready integrations achieved within six months of the program's launch in August. Through the collaboration of the program, high-potential AI and Io technologies were connected, emphasizing innovation and swift market readiness.

data.title: Western Union's Q4 2025 revenue: $1.0 billion, down 5% on both reported and adjusted basis. GAAP EPS: $0.36.
data.description: In Denver, the Western Union Company disclosed its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025. The company reported a revenue of $1.0 billion in the fourth quarter, marking a 5% decrease on both reported and adjusted bases. This revenue shift was primarily influenced by increased performance in Consumer Services and Branded Digital sectors, partially balanced by a downturn in the Americas retail division. The fourth quarter GAAP EPS stood at $0.36, a decrease from $1.13 in the previous year.

data.title: Ranger Energy Services to report Q4 and full year 2025 results on March 5, 2026, followed by a conference call at 10am ET.
data.description: Houston-based Ranger Energy Services, Inc. (NYSE:RNGR) is scheduled to release its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Thursday, March 5, 2026, before the market opens. The company will conduct an earnings conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time (9:00 a.m. Central time) post the announcement. To participate, individuals can dial 1-833-255-2829 domestically or 1-412-902-6710 for international calls.

data.title: Generac named finalist for Wisconsin Manufacturer of the Year. Highlights 65-year commitment to manufacturing in Wisconsin.
data.description: Generac Holdings Inc., a prominent global company (NYSE: GNRC) known for its energy technology solutions, has recently been recognized for its 65-year dedication to Wisconsin's manufacturing, innovation, and community impact. The acknowledgment signifies Generac's longstanding commitment to these areas and reinforces the company's influence in the industry. The recognition was announced in Waukesha, Wisconsin on February 20, 2026.

data.title: Doseology Sciences appoints Larry Latowsky as Executive Chairman, effective February 18.
data.description: In Vancouver on February 20, 2026, Doseology Sciences Inc. (CSE: MOOD) (PINK: DOSEF) (FSE: VU70) appointed Larry Latowsky as a director and Executive Chairman of its Board of Directors on February 18.

data.title: Oil States International, Inc. reports 8% revenue growth in Q4 2025 with $178.4K earnings, but operating loss at $113.6K.
data.description: Houston-based Oil States International, Inc. (NYSE: OIS) reported its financial results for the three months ending December 31, 2025, showing a revenue of $178,464 thousand which marked an 8% increase from the previous quarter and a year-over-year increase of 8%. However, the company reported an operating loss of $113,635 thousand for this period, contrasting with an operating income of $4,748 thousand in the quarter ending September 30, 2025, and $18,484 thousand in the same period of 2024. The adjusted operating income, excluding charges and credits, was $10,973 thousand for the period. These results depict a significant shift in the company's financial performance compared to earlier periods.

data.title: BWXT appoints Dan Jablonsky to board of directors effective March 2, 2026. He will serve on audit and finance committee.
data.description: BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) based in Melbourne, Florida shared that Dan Jablonsky is joining their board of directors starting March 2, 2026. Additionally, he will be a part of the audit and finance committee. Jablonsky previously held the positions of CEO and chairman at Ursa Major, a respected company specializing in advanced propulsion systems for space and defense purposes. With over a decade of experience in the aerospace and defense sector, Jablonsky brings valuable expertise to the BWX team.
